channel.title: cdk on Morgoth
channel.description: Recent content in cdk on Morgoth

item.title: CDK
item.description: CDK Cloud Development Kit SDK一般是和service交互的。 CDK用来和基础设施交互的。 AWS CDK The AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) is an open-source software development framework to define cloud infrastructure in code and provision it through AWS CloudFormation. https://github.com/aws/aws-cdk CDK8S cdk8s is an open-source software
